repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(agents): add tool-activity heartbeat to keep subagent alive during tool calls
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repair plan for #95536:

## What Problem This Solves
Rebase the existing contributor branch for the subagent LLM idle-timeout/tool-activity heartbeat fix onto current main without broadening the PR.

## Why This Change Was Made
The hydrated PR is maintainer-editable and has successful real behavior proof, but GitHub reports it dirty against main. The executor should preserve the current runId-scoped heartbeat implementation and resolve only rebase conflicts.

## User Impact
If later finalized, long-running subagent tool calls can keep the LLM idle watchdog alive while the run is actively making tool progress, reducing premature subagent termination during multi-step data collection.

## Evidence
Preflight main: fab69517b3d4ab4e94ec16f7744f2966769ee611. Reviewed PR head: fcf4be0da6baaa24523fc7a5900eec14962983a0. Hydrated #95536 has Real behavior proof=SUCCESS and mergeable_state=dirty. After repair, run focused idle-timeout/heartbeat tests, pnpm check:changed, and Codex /review before any separate exact-head merge finalization.
